vBRIEFInfo.description: Create scripts/issue_ingest.py with single-issue and bulk modes, dedup against existing references, Taskfile wiring, doc cross-refs, tests.

plan.title: v0.20.0 GA blocker: add task issue:ingest for GitHub issue -> vBRIEF ingestion

narratives.Problem: vbrief/vbrief.md declares origin-provenance ingestion as a MUST but ships no tool to perform it. Only migrate (one-time) and reconcile (read-only) exist. Every post-GA issue grows reconcile unlinked section monotonically; mitigations are hand-author, ignore, or re-migrate (no longer works).
narratives.Action: Create scripts/issue_ingest.py. Single-issue mode: fetch via gh api, dedup via scan_vbrief_dir (reused from reconcile_issues.py), write vbrief/proposed/YYYY-MM-DD-<N>-<slug>.vbrief.json with references type=github-issue. Bulk mode: --all [--label] [--status] [--dry-run] using fetch_open_issues. Extract shared helpers (_slugify, _create_scope_vbrief) from migrate_vbrief.py into scripts/_vbrief_build.py or promote in place. Wire task issue:ingest in Taskfile.yml. Document in vbrief.md Quick Reference, README Ingesting GitHub issues subsection, UPGRADING.md v0.20 section.
narratives.Test: tests/cli/test_issue_ingest.py: single-issue happy path, dedup hit (exit 1 + existing path), bulk mode summary, --dry-run no-writes, gh API error (exit 2). In-process module loading via importlib.util matching existing tests/cli style.
narratives.Outcome: New GitHub issues can be ingested into vbrief/proposed/ with one command, preserving origin provenance. reconcile unlinked section stays manageable post-GA. PR 403 checklist item #454 satisfied.

items.title: Extract _slugify and _create_scope_vbrief helpers to a shared module
Add task issue:ingest to vbrief/vbrief.md Quick Reference Task Commands table
Add Ingesting GitHub issues subsection to README.md
Mention task issue:ingest in UPGRADING.md v0.20 section
